description: Add new action types (koreksi_jurnal, analisis_akun, laporan_ringkasan) to the frontend execution engine, enhance the action confirmation UI with edit capability, and add richer action previews.
steps: 1. Add handling for 'koreksi_jurnal' action type in renderActionConfirmation() in keuangan-app.js. This action edits an existing journal entry. Display the old values vs new values in a comparison table. The action JSON format: {type:'koreksi_jurnal', id:'jurnal_id', changes:{keterangan:'new', tanggal:'new', lines:[...]}}

2. Add handling for 'analisis_akun' action type in renderActionConfirmation(). This action shows a detailed analysis of a specific account. Display it as a summary card with account info. The action JSON format: {type:'analisis_akun', kodeAkun:'1-1100', periode:'2024-01'}. The confirmation button should say 'Tampilkan Analisis'.

3. Add handling for 'laporan_ringkasan' action type in renderActionConfirmation(). This generates a summary report. Format: {type:'laporan_ringkasan', jenis:'neraca|laba_rugi|arus_kas', periode:'2024-01'}. The confirmation button should say 'Generate Laporan'.

4. Implement eksekusiAIAction() handlers for the new action types: (a) koreksi_jurnal - load existing jurnal by id using KDB.get(), apply changes, save back using KDB.save(), (b) analisis_akun - compute account analysis using getFinancialData() and display in chat, (c) laporan_ringkasan - generate summary text from financial data and display in chat.

5. Add an 'Edit' button to the action confirmation UI (renderActionConfirmation) that shows editable fields for the action parameters. When user clicks edit, display input fields pre-filled with the action data. On save, update _pendingAIAction with new values and re-render the confirmation.
6. Make the action confirmation UI show a warning when action data seems incomplete (e.g., missing tanggal, zero amounts) with a message suggesting the user ask the AI to provide more details.
acceptance_criteria: renderActionConfirmation() handles koreksi_jurnal, analisis_akun, and laporan_ringkasan action types with appropriate UI
eksekusiAIAction() correctly processes all new action types - koreksi saves changes, analisis displays analysis, laporan generates summary
An 'Edit' button appears on action confirmations allowing users to modify action parameters before execution
Incomplete action data shows a warning to the user
All existing action types (jurnal, topup_pc, pengeluaran_pc, hapus_jurnal) continue to work unchanged
findings: All changes pass node --check. Added 3 new action types (koreksi_jurnal, analisis_akun, laporan_ringkasan) to both renderActionConfirmation and eksekusiAIAction. Added editAIAction/simpanEditAIAction/batalEditAIAction functions for inline editing. Added completeness warning for missing data. Custom confirm button labels for read-only action types. Total addition: ~306 lines in keuangan-app.js AI section.
